notes: Dataset assembled from publicly accessible Miralis sources and indexable PDFs.
Dealer-only documents (price books, SKU-level order sheets, net cost grids) were not publicly exposed in indexed sources.

sources.title: Miralis Magazine (English)
highlights: Door model + code mapping by collection (Laminate, European Laminate, Similacquer, Lacquer, Wood, Advanced Engineering/FENIX).
Collection characteristics such as durability, humidity resistance, easy maintenance, matching interiors.
Cabinet interior section: melamine and plywood cabinet interiors in four colors/textures.
Innovation section: Curio with LED, concealed hinges, wall-mount system, custom-made options.

sources.title: Miralis Maintenance Guide (English)
highlights: Lifecycle and durability context: hinge adjustments, drawer hardware platforms (Blum, Grass, Hettich).
Corrosion prevention and cleaner storage guidance affecting long-term performance.
Lifetime limited warranty section start and update date for products sold after September 23, 2019.
Warranty exclusions include installation/removal cost and damage outside Miralis control.

sources.title: Miralis Kitchen Cabinets page
highlights: Public-facing positioning links back to catalogue and maintenance assets.
Collections shown include Modern, Contemporary, and Handleless approaches used for value positioning.

color_examples: Laminate: 113 Super White, K18 Monaco, L761 Moonlight, M2055 Ganache
European Laminate: H210 Obscurity, H212 Ash Samara, H216 Amber Drupe
Similacquer Matte/Gloss: SA107-G Simply White, SA350-M Northern Floe, SA352-M Sea Breeze
Advanced Engineering/FENIX: SF115-M Alpaca Wool, SF119-M Black Satin, SF200 Silver Steel
construction_options: Cabinet interior substrates: melamine cabinet and plywood cabinet options
Interior finish textures: linen and wood texture
Interior colors: four colorways including anthracite linen and white anthracite linen
Finger Grip variants available on all Miralis materials (handleless style)
hardware_and_accessories: Hinges: adjustable hidden and standard hinges
Drawer systems referenced: Blum Legrabox + Blumotion, Grass Vionaro V8, Hettich AvanTech YOU, Hettich Actro 5D
Contemporary Curio accessory furniture: LED strip lighting, glass shelving, concealed hinges, wall mounting

price_drivers: Material ladder typically moves Laminate < Similacquer < Lacquer < Advanced Engineering/FENIX or premium wood selections.
Door profile complexity (45° assemblies, finger grip machining, wood species) and finish process elevate labor cost.
Accessory density (lighting, curio integrations, premium drawer runners) increases system cost.
Custom colors and grain-alignment requests are likely quote multipliers.
durability_factors: Humidity resistance is explicitly marketed for Similacquer.
European laminate is described as very resistant with matching interior finish program.
Maintenance guide indicates regular hinge tuning as part of expected normal use.
Chemical storage practices can influence corrosion and long-term hardware life.
value_framework: Entry value: laminate programs with wide color matrix and simpler edge architecture.
Mid-tier value: similacquer offers design lift with manageable maintenance profile.
Upper-tier value: lacquer and FENIX/advanced engineering for premium appearance and tactile performance.
Performance adders: branded runner platforms and integrated lighting/accessories.
missing_for_true_dealer_pricing: Current dealer price book / net cost matrix
Cabinet box SKU catalog by width-height-depth code
Official order sheets and option code dictionary
Upcharge tables for finish upgrades, modifications, and rush lead times
